Our gameplay features05

level-up
system

LEVEL UP YOUR HORSES WITH XP EARNED FROM RACES AND UPGRADE THEIR ITEMS FOR IMPROVED SPEED, AGILITY, AND STAMINA. WITH UPGRADED LAPIS STONES, YOU'LL HAVE AN ADVANTAGE IN SPECIFICRACES. COLLECT RESOURCESTO DOMINATE THE TRACK!

META
GUILD HOUSE

JOIN TO A META GUILD AND TRY TO ACCOMPLISH TEAM ACTIVITIES SUCH AS DUO RACE IN ORDER TO GET BETTER REWARDS!

pvp &
pve

MetaHorse Unity offers a diverse and engaging gameplay experience that caters to players of all skill levels. Whether you prefer the thrill of racing against AI opponents or the excitement of competing against real players, MetaHorse Unity delivers a dynamic and immersive horse racing adventure that will keep you entertained and challenged for hours on end.

quest
feature

EXPLORE HUGE QUEST SYSTEMS IN METAHORSE UNITY THAT WILL IMMERSE YOU IN RPG GAMEPLAY:

  • Daily, Weekly, Monthly Quests
  • Battle Pass Quests
  • Social Media Quests
  • Friend Reference System
gacha

Gacha Events present a pool of related Rare Metahorses. If you roll a Rare Ticket, or purchase a draw with ‘’Horse Medal’’ in a specific gacha event, there is chance to obtain one or more of the � Rare Metahorse from that event pool!

Unleash
Speed

The Ultimate RPG Horse Racing Game

you can
own them01

Metahorse Unity is a unique gaming experience that blends both the Free-to-Play and Play-to-Earn models. With Metahorse Unity, you have the option to play casually with free heroes or level up your gameplay by acquiring NFTs, allowing you to start earning and maximizing your profits.

Unlock NFT Power in Metahorse Unity01

Metahorse Unity is a unique gaming experience that centers around valuable NFTs. By acquiring core riders, core meta horses, and item NFTs, you can maximize your profits and gain ownership of these valuable assets. While you will need to invest in these NFTs to reap the full benefits, Metahorse Unity still offers an immersive and engaging gameplay experience. Join the Metahorse Unity community and explore the possibilities of owning valuable NFTs.

%100 FREE
ENTRY01

At Metahorse Unity, our dream is to develop a game that is accessible to everyone, regardless of high costs. With free entry to the game, we strive to provide a unique gaming experience to all players.

Skill, Balance, Victory01

Metahorse Unity is built upon the principle that players can attain success in PvP through skill and strategy, while also maintaining a balanced in-game economy that provides a fair and equal playing field for all participants.

JOIN GUILD OR EQUSTIRIAN RACE01

Metahorse Unity is a unique gaming experience that blends both the Free-to-Play and Play-to-Earn models. With Metahorse Unity, you have the option to play casually with free heroes or level up your gameplay by acquiring NFTs, allowing you to start earning and maximizing your profits.

Metahorse classes03

Tab 1
Tab 2
model
Cyber

Core Metahorse Class from Haywood Chronicles, Orbital Kingdom and Corpo Hunter origins.

METAPOWER

Combine combat ability with strong stealth skills, and specialize in defeating enemies without becoming involved in a protracted melee.

Cyber
model
Dragon

This class is generally had some of the lowest physical stats but also the highest magical stats. Dragonborn horses can surprise you during the race with their unique skills.

METAPOWER

The Dragons. Horses, infused with the volcanic power of their homeworld Choke, held strength, speed and agility, and the unwavering belief in their war they were waging. Dragons, their home of Choke, ruined, separated and lived on all three worlds.

Dragon
model
Unicorn

A healer type of character class. The ability to deal damage or to enhance the attributes of their allies.

METAPOWER

Class description: Magical powers can be channeled to heal themselves and their duos & guild members, as well as create shields to protect them from harm. Join the Core Unicorn Metahorse Guild with Astral Mage, Angel of Sand, Fair Foxie origins.

Unicorn
model
Warrior

Warrior character's skills are centered around strength and physical combat with a wide variety of melee weapons, and the ability to survive, usually at the cost of agility or range.

METAPOWER

Warrior horses are powerful and formidable creatures, known for their incredible strength, resilience, and fierce fighting spirit. With impressive horns or steel armors protruding from their forehead, these majestic creatures are adept at absorbing damage and protecting their allies. They can create barriers or force fields to shield themselves and their allies and even regenerate their health over time. However, training a warrior horse requires a skilled and confident rider who can earn their trust and respect, but those who succeed will have a valuable and loyal ally on the battlefield.

Warrior

our team09

Hungri Games was founded in 2019 Since then, we have developed and published 3 RPG titles on mobile with over 32 headcounts from all around the world, in� roles� such� as� game� design� and development, blockchain development, HR, Product Owners, Level Design, and Publishing Support and more.

Kağan Berk Koçak
Founder

Kağan Berk Koçak as the founder of Hungri games, has 7+ years of product management in mobile gaming & launched AAA f2p mobile games in Turkey. Before Joining Hungri Games, he was the Lead Product Manager at Yoozoo Games and Operations Lead at Bigpoint GmbH.

visit LinkedIn
visit twitter
Arslan Kiran
Founder

Arslan Kiran, Hungri Games founder & gaming industry veteran, has 13+ yrs exp in MENA & Germany market entry strategies. He expanded into Turkey, East Europe, Korea, Japan & MENA while holding leadership roles at Garena, Yoozoo Games & Bigpoint, and established partnerships with top Chinese and Korean game developers & publishers.

visit LinkedIn
visit twitter
Oğuz Kurtalan
Founder

Oğuz Kurtalan (CFO - Founder) has extensive experience in stock investment, blockchain, and cryptocurrency investment. He worked at Garena, Yoozoo Games, and Bigpoint as a finance lead for expansion markets.

visit LinkedIn
visit twitter
Sevara Shodieva
Founder

Sevara Shodieva (BI Lead - Founder) analyzed gaming trends at Yoozoo Games, making $10M/month & preparing KPI reports for Turkey & MENA. Holds an executive MBA from Istanbul University.

visit LinkedIn
visit twitter
Orgil Urtnasan
CTO

Orgil Urtnasan (CTO) has +15 years of experience as a programmer and game developer with high knowledge of blockchain programming and online gaming platform. He is managing the development of Hungri Games' web3 titles and has the vision to create a tech platform for Web2 games entering the Web3 space.

visit LinkedIn
visit twitter

faq's10

Here you can learn a little more and get answers to questions you didn't find above

What is Metahorse Unity

Welcome to the world of Metahorse Unity, the most thrilling e-sport friendly rpg horse racing game you've ever played. Based on cutting-edge Blockchain technology, Metahorse Unity allows you to gather your friends, form a team, and battle against other players to earn token rewards with your skills.
‍
With gameplay designed to emphasize both personal skill and teamwork, you'll need to strategize and communicate effectively with your teammates to come out on top. Metahorse Unity offers a range of game modes, including MOBA, RPG, and Strategy, with monthly updates and attractive rewards to keep things fresh.

Prepare to be fully immersed in the game's gripping atmosphere – one minute you'll be charging headlong into battle, the next you'll be scrambling to come up with a new plan to turn the tide. And with hundreds of items and gear to choose from, you'll be able to outfit your horses to suit your playstyle.

So what are you waiting for? Play for free and play to earn in Metahorse Unity – the ultimate e-sport experience.

How can I win in Metahorse Unity?
  • Participating in races against other players
  • Improving your skills by racing and breeding and ranking higher in tournaments
  • Owning a breed horse and letting other players breed to improve their skills
  • Riding with other’s horses as a professional rider
How do I earn and spend for consumables in the game?

You can earn consumables by participating in races, completing quests, and achieving specific milestones. These consumables can be used to enhance your horse's performance, provide temporary boosts, or aid in their recovery.

Dive into the world of Metahorse Unity11
